topic: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

drills.title: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 1

sentences.hindi: मैं रोज़ चावल खाता हूँ।

sentences.english: I am eating food right now.
sentences.hindi: मैं अभी खाना खा रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i am eating food right now

sentences.hindi: मैंने खाना खा लिया है।

drills.title: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: I have been studying for an hour.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से पढ़ रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i have been studying for an hour

sentences.english: She goes to work every day.
sentences.hindi: वह हर दिन काम पर जाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: she goes to work every day

sentences.hindi: वह अभी काम कर रही है।

drills.title: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 3

sentences.hindi: उसने अपना काम पूरा कर लिया है।

sentences.english: She has been working for two hours.
sentences.hindi: वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही है।
sentences.pronunciation: she has been working for two hours

sentences.english: They go to school every day.
sentences.hindi: वे रोज़ स्कूल जाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: they go to school every day

drills.title: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 4

sentences.hindi: वे अभी खेल रहे हैं।
उन्होंने अपना homework कर लिया है।

sentences.english: They have been playing since morning.
sentences.hindi: वे सुबह से खेल रहे हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: they have been playing since morning

drills.title: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 5

sentences.hindi: मैं हर सुबह exercise करता हूँ।
मैं अभी पढ़ रहा हूँ।
मैंने यह किताब पढ़ ली है।

drills.title: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: I have been reading this book for three hours.
sentences.hindi: मैं तीन घंटे से यह किताब पढ़ रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i have been reading this book for three hours

sentences.hindi: वह अच्छा गाता है।
वह अभी गा रहा है।

drills.title: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: He has sung a new song.
sentences.hindi: उसने एक नया गाना गाया है।
sentences.pronunciation: he has sung a new song

sentences.english: He has been singing for half an hour.
sentences.hindi: वह आधे घंटे से गा रहा है।
sentences.pronunciation: he has been singing for half an hour
